creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
In article <201210210830.q9L8U1dR000256@freefall.freebsd.org> you write:
> Thanks, that works. It just made an old video driver/graphics board issue pop up again which I neglected to investigate when I moved the old system disc to a new box (hence the i386 OS on an amd64 CPU)

Ah so it was in fact just missing/broken xvideo driver support or
something like that and not an actual vlc issue?
